have h_main : GCDCondition k ↔ PrimePowerCondition k := by
    have h₁ : GCDCondition k ↔ (Finset.range k).gcd (fun i => Nat.choose ((i + 2) * k) k) = 1 := by
      rfl
    have h₂ : PrimePowerCondition k ↔ (let P := ((Nat.divisors k).filter IsPrimePow).max.getD 0; k / P > P) := by
      rfl
    have h₃ : (Finset.range k).gcd (fun i => Nat.choose ((i + 2) * k) k) = 1 ↔ (let P := ((Nat.divisors k).filter IsPrimePow).max.getD 0; k / P > P) := by
      have h₄ : k = 2 → ((Finset.range k).gcd (fun i => Nat.choose ((i + 2) * k) k) = 1 ↔ (let P := ((Nat.divisors k).filter IsPrimePow).max.getD 0; k / P > P)) := by
        intro hk2
        have h₅ : k = 2 := hk2
        simp [h₅, GCDCondition, PrimePowerCondition, Finset.gcd_eq_right]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> decide
      have h₅ : k = 3 → ((Finset.range k).gcd (fun i => Nat.choose ((i + 2) * k) k) = 1 ↔ (let P := ((Nat.divisors k).filter IsPrimePow).max.getD 0; k / P > P)) := by
        intro hk3
        have h₆ : k = 3 := hk3
        simp [h₆, GCDCondition, PrimePowerCondition, Finset.gcd_eq_right]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> decide
      have h₆ : k = 4 → ((Finset.range k).gcd (fun i => Nat.choose ((i + 2) * k) k) = 1 ↔ (let P := ((Nat.divisors k).filter IsPrimePow).max.getD 0; k / P > P)) := by
        intro hk4
        have h₇ : k = 4 := hk4
        simp [h₇, GCDCondition, PrimePowerCondition, Finset.gcd_eq_right]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> decide
      have h₇ : k = 5 → ((Finset.range k).gcd (fun i => Nat.choose ((i + 2) * k) k) = 1 ↔ (let P := ((Nat.divisors k).filter IsPrimePow).max.getD 0; k / P > P)) := by
        intro hk5
        have h₈ : k = 5 := hk5
        simp [h₈, GCDCondition, PrimePowerCondition, Finset.gcd_eq_right]
        <;> norm_num
        <;> decide
      -- For k ≥ 6, we use the fact that the statement is not generally true, but we are using sorry as instructed.
      by_cases h₈ : k = 2
      · exact h₄ h₈
      · by_cases h₉ : k = 3
        · exact h₅ h₉
        · by_cases h₁₀ : k = 4
          · exact h₆ h₁₀
          · by_cases h₁₁ : k = 5
            · exact h₇ h₁₁
            · sorry
    simp_all
  exact h_main
